TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-medicine_robo pihu 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: cbeyo uka iyu uka ising.
S.PHON: ʦbejo uka iju uka isiŋ.
S.FORM: cbeyo uka iyu uka ising.
S.PHON: ʦbejo uka iju uka isiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 過去沒有藥,也沒有醫生.
In the past, there was no medicine. There was no doctor.

S.FORM: luqah ge asi ka sdngedang qsiya kiya iyu na.
S.PHON: luqaħ ge asi ka sdŋedaŋ qsija kija iju na.
S.FORM: luqah ge asi ka sdngedang qsiya kiya iyu na.
S.PHON: luqaħ ge asi ka sdŋedaŋ qsija kija iju na.
S.TRANSL: 若受傷,就得燒開水,那就是受傷的藥.
When got hurt, we immediately boiled water and that was the medicine.

S.FORM: nasinak kntteun so dmngedang qsiya di ge.
S.PHON: nasinak kntteun so dmŋedaŋ qsija di ge.
S.FORM: nasinak kntteun so dmngedang qsiya di ge.
S.PHON: nasinak kntteun so dmŋedaŋ qsija di ge.
S.TRANSL: 一定要一直煮水.
must keep boiling water.

S.FORM: malu nak so nexan di ini nak ini kmalu dmudun nak paru ka luqah.
S.PHON: malu nak so nexan di ini nak ini kmalu dmudun nak paɾu ka luqaħ.
S.FORM: malu nak so nexan di ini nak ini kmalu dmudun nak paru ka luqah.
S.PHON: malu nak so nexan di ini nak ini kmalu dmudun nak paɾu ka luqaħ.
S.TRANSL: 不久傷口會癒合,不會好的就不會好.傷口會自己越來越嚴重.
It will heal soon. The one that does not heal will not heal. The wound would become more and more serious itself.

S.FORM: so kiya ka cbeyo uka ising.
S.PHON: so kija ka ʦbejo uka isiŋ.
S.FORM: so kiya ka cbeyo uka ising.
S.PHON: so kija ka ʦbejo uka isiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 過去沒有醫生就是這樣做.
In the past, there was no doctor, so people acted this way.

S.FORM: kika saya di ge malu di.
S.PHON: kika saja di ge malu di.
S.FORM: kika saya di ge malu di.
S.PHON: kika saja di ge malu di.
S.TRANSL: 現在比較好了.
Nowadays, it has been better.

S.FORM: anu ka luqah di ge ricuhan iyu de malu.
S.PHON: anu ka luqaħ di ge ɾiʦuħan iju de malu.
S.FORM: anu ka luqah di ge ricuhan iyu de malu.
S.PHON: anu ka luqaħ di ge ɾiʦuħan iju de malu.
S.TRANSL: 受傷的話擦藥就會好.
If you are wounded, you simply apply medicine.

S.FORM: cbeyo ge uka iyu uka ising ma dmudun paru ka luqah.
S.PHON: ʦbejo ge uka iju uka isiŋ ma dmudun paɾu ka luqaħ.
S.FORM: cbeyo ge uka iyu uka ising ma dmudun paru ka luqah.
S.PHON: ʦbejo ge uka iju uka isiŋ ma dmudun paɾu ka luqaħ.
S.TRANSL: 以前有沒有藥沒有醫生,傷勢會愈來愈嚴重.
There was neither medicine nor doctor in the past. The wound got worse.

S.FORM: ma sapuhan duri de asi ka eniqan ka luqah a meyah nanaq uri ge m m asi ka sapuhun malu di.
S.PHON: ma sapuħan duɾi de asi ka eniqan ka luqaħ a mejaħ nanaq uɾi ge m m asi ka sapuħun malu di.
S.FORM: ma sapuhan duri de asi ka eniqan ka luqah a meyah nanaq uri ge m m asi ka sapuhun malu di.
S.PHON: ma sapuħan duɾi de asi ka eniqan ka luqaħ a mejaħ nanaq uɾi ge m m asi ka sapuħun malu di.
S.TRANSL: 如果自己長瘡,一定要尋求巫術才會好.
If a skin ulcer was developed, we must turn to sorcery in order to cure it.

S.FORM: uka ka iyu ricuh di.
S.PHON: uka ka iju ɾiʦuħ di.
S.FORM: uka ka iyu ricuh di.
S.PHON: uka ka iju ɾiʦuħ di.
S.TRANSL: 沒有藥可以擦.
There was no medicine to apply.

S.FORM: so kiya ka ndaan cbeyo.
S.PHON: so kija ka ndaan ʦbejo.
S.FORM: so kiya ka ndaan cbeyo.
S.PHON: so kija ka ndaan ʦbejo.
S.TRANSL: 以前的狀況就是這樣.
That was the situation in the past.

S.FORM: mqraqin riyung ka ndaan cbeyo uka iyu ma uka ising.
S.PHON: mqɾaqin ɾijuŋ ka ndaan ʦbejo uka iju ma uka isiŋ.
S.FORM: mqraqin riyung ka ndaan cbeyo uka iyu ma uka ising.
S.PHON: mqɾaqin ɾijuŋ ka ndaan ʦbejo uka iju ma uka isiŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 由於沒有藥沒有醫生,以前(醫療的)過程很辛苦.

S.TRANSL: 由於沒有藥沒有醫生,以前 過程很辛苦.

TRANSL.notes: Because there was neither medicine nor doctor in the past, the (medical) procedure was painstaking.

S.TRANSL: Because there was neither medicine nor doctor in the past, the procedure was painstaking.

S.FORM: sm skadi nak so so ka rricuhdaha skadi sudu sricuhdaha uri so kiya.
S.PHON: sm skadi nak so so ka ɾɾiʦuħdaħa skadi sudu sɾiʦuħdaħa uɾi so kija.
S.FORM: sm skadi nak so so ka rricuhdaha skadi sudu sricuhdaha uri so kiya.
S.PHON: sm skadi nak so so ka ɾɾiʦuħdaħa skadi sudu sɾiʦuħdaħa uɾi so kija.
S.TRANSL: 他們也會自己找要擦傷口的草藥用來擦傷口,就這樣.

TRANSL.notes: They would also look for herbs for application to apply (to the wound). Like that.

S.TRANSL: They would also look for herbs for application to apply . Like that.

S.FORM: saya di ge malu eniqan iyu ma.
S.PHON: saja di ge malu eniqan iju ma.
S.FORM: saya di ge malu eniqan iyu ma.
S.PHON: saja di ge malu eniqan iju ma.
S.TRANSL: 現在,有藥就好多了.
Nowadays, the situations are better since there is medicine.

S.FORM: mekan iyu ising de malu ka luqah.
S.PHON: mekan iju isiŋ de malu ka luqaħ.
S.FORM: mekan iyu ising de malu ka luqah.
S.PHON: mekan iju isiŋ de malu ka luqaħ.
S.TRANSL: 吃了醫生給的藥傷口就會好.
Eat the medicine prescribed by the doctor, and the wound will heal.

S.FORM: so kiya ka ndaan.
S.PHON: so kija ka ndaan.
S.FORM: so kiya ka ndaan.
S.PHON: so kija ka ndaan.
S.TRANSL: 以前的治療過程就那樣.
The procedure in the past was like that.

S.FORM: kiya da ma kika ani maanu ka ndaan cbeyo ge naqah riyung uka ising.
S.PHON: kija da ma kika ani maanu ka ndaan ʦbejo ge naqaħ ɾijuŋ uka isiŋ.
S.FORM: kiya da ma kika ani maanu ka ndaan cbeyo ge naqah riyung uka ising.
S.PHON: kija da ma kika ani maanu ka ndaan ʦbejo ge naqaħ ɾijuŋ uka isiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 無論如何,以前沒有醫生是非常不好的
Anyway, in the past, it was unfortunate that there was no doctor.

S.FORM: kiya nii huwa mesa uri ini kelai mnarux uri ge asi ka sapuhun malu.
S.PHON: kija nii ħuwa mesa uɾi ini kelai mnaɾux uɾi ge asi ka sapuħun malu.
S.FORM: kiya nii huwa mesa uri ini kelai mnarux uri ge asi ka sapuhun malu.
S.PHON: kija nii ħuwa mesa uɾi ini kelai mnaɾux uɾi ge asi ka sapuħun malu.
S.TRANSL: 所以這個會怎麼樣也不知道.如果生病,接受巫術治療比較好.
So it was unknown what that would come to be. If one was sick, it was better that he received the treatment of sorcery.

S.FORM: ini nak kmalu de mgedang kiya di.
S.PHON: ini nak kmalu de mgedaŋ kija di.
S.FORM: ini nak kmalu de mgedang kiya di.
S.PHON: ini nak kmalu de mgedaŋ kija di.
S.TRANSL: 不會好的會死掉.
He would die if he did not recover.

S.FORM: so kiya ka ndaanmiyan cbeyo yami.
S.PHON: so kija ka ndaanmijan ʦbejo jami.
S.FORM: so kiya ka ndaanmiyan cbeyo yami.
S.PHON: so kija ka ndaanmijan ʦbejo jami.
S.TRANSL: 那就是我們過去的狀況.
That was our situation in the past.

S.FORM: ini knt so kiya ndaan cbeyo nanaq.
S.PHON: ini knt so kija ndaan ʦbejo nanaq.
S.FORM: ini knt so kiya ndaan cbeyo nanaq.
S.PHON: ini knt so kija ndaan ʦbejo nanaq.
S.TRANSL: 以前就只是這樣而已.
It was simply like that in the past.

S.FORM: iniku skela riyung yaku uri mbahangku peni mbahangku kari a rudan.
S.PHON: iniku skela ɾijuŋ jaku uɾi mbaħaŋku peni mbaħaŋku kaɾi a ɾudan.
S.FORM: iniku skela riyung yaku uri mbahangku peni mbahangku kari a rudan.
S.PHON: iniku skela ɾijuŋ jaku uɾi mbaħaŋku peni mbaħaŋku kaɾi a ɾudan.

TRANSL.notes: (那樣的日子)我不是全部都趕上,我有的也是從長輩那裡聽來的.

S.TRANSL: 我不是全部都趕上,我有的也是從長輩那裡聽來的.

TRANSL.notes: I did not catch up on all (the old days). I also heard some from the elderly.

S.TRANSL: I did not catch up on all . I also heard some from the elderly.

S.FORM: asi ka rudan mkela ka malu saya di.
S.PHON: asi ka ɾudan mkela ka malu saja di.
S.FORM: asi ka rudan mkela ka malu saya di.
S.PHON: asi ka ɾudan mkela ka malu saja di.
S.TRANSL: 現在很好了.
It is good now.

S.FORM: meniq yami ge iniku kela ka ndaan cbeyo di.
S.PHON: meniq jami ge iniku kela ka ndaan ʦbejo di.
S.FORM: meniq yami ge iniku kela ka ndaan cbeyo di.
S.PHON: meniq jami ge iniku kela ka ndaan ʦbejo di.
S.TRANSL: 像我們這一輩呢,不知道以前的狀況.
We who live today do not know about the situation in the past.

S.FORM: wana nak ka henu ka kelaun ano nak kii.
S.PHON: wana nak ka ħenu ka kelaun ano nak kii.
S.FORM: wana nak ka henu ka kelaun ano nak kii.
S.PHON: wana nak ka ħenu ka kelaun ano nak kii.
S.TRANSL: 我知道的僅僅那些.
What I know is only that.
